html_excerpt:
In July 2021, GOBI Cashmere's cashmere yarns earned the OEKO-TEX® STANDARD 100 certification. In February 2024, we achieved another major milestone by becoming the first Mongolian company to receive the same certification for finished garments.

This certification ensures that all certified GOBI products — including garments and accessories — are free from harmful substances, safe for human use, and gentle on the skin, guaranteeing quality and safety at every stage of production.

By continuously expanding and renewing our certified product range, GOBI leads the way in sustainable cashmere production, proudly showcasing Mongolian craftsmanship, innovation, and responsibility in every thread.
Since 2021, GOBI Cashmere has integrated Mongolian tradition with modern innovation through a robust ISO 9001:2015 quality management system.​ ​

The system ensures that all processes–from raw material sourcing to final product–follow rigorous quality, environmental, and ethical requirements. By continuously improving these processes, we strive to satisfy customer expectations while upholding our responsibilities towars society, people, and the environment.​
Since 2021, GOBI Cashmere has proudly held the SFA Clean Fibre Processing Gold Level Certification, recognizing our leadership in sustainable cashmere production and responsible manufacturing. This achievement reflects our commitment to producing cashmere that is luxurious, ethical, and environmentally conscious.​ ​

The Sustainable Fibre Alliance (SFA) is a global non-profit organization that promotes responsible practices across the fibre supply chain. The Clean Fibre Processing Standard ensures that first-stage facilities wash and dehair raw cashmere while meeting the highest environmental, social, and chemical safety standards.​ ​

At GOBI, we uphold these standards — blending Mongolian tradition, modern innovation, and sustainable excellence in every piece of cashmere.​

#GobiCashmere

Luxury Cashmere Clothing by GOBI Mongolian Cashmere

Welcome to GOBI Mongolian Cashmere, where luxury cashmere meets unmatched quality and heritage. Our mission is to bring warmth, comfort, beauty, and joy to the world with 100% Mongolian cashmere while improving the lives of our people and our homeland. Each piece reflects our dedication to sustainable craftsmanship, preserving Mongolia’s rich heritage through our commitment to excellence.Read More

Our Core Values

GOBI Cashmere’s core values that guide every aspect of what we do:
  • Authentic: Honoring Mongolia’s nomadic traditions and values in every creation.
  • Quality: Ensuring meticulous care and attention to bring you consistently exceptional products.
  • Virtuous: Committed to sustainable and cruelty-free practices across our supply chain.
  • Accessible: Offering fine cashmere as an everyday luxury with reasonable pricing, without compromising quality.
  • Modern: Blending over 40 years of experience with modern innovation to create an environment where people thrive.
These values are at the heart of GOBI Cashmere’s identity, shaping every product, interaction, and initiative.

Why Choose Luxury Cashmere?

At GOBI, we offer more than just clothing; we offer a truly elevated experience. Cashmere is celebrated for its unparalleled softness, warmth, and durability. Our reputation as a leading luxury cashmere brand ensures that each piece is crafted with care, making every item in our collection a worthy addition to your wardrobe.

Explore Our Cashmere Clothing Collection

From versatile cashmere sweaters, cashmere cardigans, and scarves to elegant cashmere coats, GOBI’s cashmere clothing line embraces both style and sustainability. Discover our collection and see why GOBI is a trusted name in cashmere apparel worldwide.

Sustainability & Ethical Practices

Our journey begins with ethical sourcing from Mongolian herders, prioritizing eco-friendly practices that benefit the environment and local communities. GOBI Cashmere is dedicated to a sustainable production process that preserves Mongolia’s landscapes and reflects our values.

Shop Gobi Cashmere Online

Experience the ease of shopping at our cashmere online store. With worldwide shipping, detailed size guides, and customer reviews, finding your next luxury cashmere piece has never been easier. Embrace the unmatched quality and timeless elegance of GOBI Cashmere.

Elevate Your Wardrobe with Gobi Cashmere

Invest in comfort, style, and enduring quality. Explore GOBI’s luxury cashmere clothing today to find pieces that bring warmth, beauty, and authenticity into your life. Join us in celebrating cashmere’s finest form, crafted from Mongolia to the world.

Frequently Asked Questions

1. Is Gobi real cashmere?

Yes, Gobi Cashmere uses 100% real Mongolian cashmere for all its products. We are committed to authenticity and quality, ensuring that each piece is crafted with genuine cashmere, sourced ethically from the soft undercoats of Mongolian goats.

2. Is Gobi good quality?

Absolutely. Gobi Cashmere takes pride in delivering the highest quality cashmere. Every item undergoes rigorous quality checks and is crafted with meticulous attention to detail, resulting in luxurious, durable pieces that stand the test of time. Our commitment to quality is one of our core values.

3. Is Mongolian cashmere high quality?

Yes, Mongolian cashmere is considered some of the highest quality cashmere in the world due to the region's unique climate. The harsh weather conditions contribute to the growth of fine, dense fibers that are incredibly soft, warm, and durable, making Mongolian cashmere highly sought after.

4. Does Gobi ship internationally?

Yes, we proudly offer worldwide shipping from our cashmere online store. We aim to make luxury cashmere accessible to customers everywhere, so you can enjoy Gobi’s timeless pieces no matter where you are. Our website provides size guides, customer reviews, and an easy shopping experience to make your purchase as seamless as possible.
